content.en:
Soon.

Ye Tian lifted this copy body, and then condensed a copy body, which solved the influence of the super-dimensional aroma.

That is, he can also use this method to get rid of the influence and replace it with other high-level realm gods, then there is no way.

"There are a lot of treasures in this super dimensional treasure land, but if you want to get treasures, you also need a certain amount of luck, otherwise it is easy to kill or be hit hard. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

He estimated that there had already been a high-level realm god who had fallen or been hit hard, after all, ordinary high-level realm gods encountered this kind of extradimensional aroma, and they had no time to escape, their will sank, and the final result would inevitably be death.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian continued to look for resources and treasures.

Time passed little by little, and soon he had a harvest.

He saw a blue-purple stone, which was not big, only the size of a basketball "three-in-one", but it contained terrifying energy and a faint extradimensional power.

There is nothing dangerous about this stone, unlike that flower, which releases that extradimensional aroma.

Ye Tian easily took this stone, and then placed this stone on the body of the copy with the weakest cultivation, which seemed to be safer.

After all, the weaker the cultivation, the less attention it is to extradimensional creatures, and as long as you don't move, the danger is not too great.

Unless you're unlucky, don't say anything.

Ye Tian didn't have time to test the effect of this stone, so he continued to look for resources.

In this way, as the years passed, Ye Tian harvested one item after another, but more often than not, he still encountered great danger.

And on this day, one of his replicating bodies encountered an extradimensional creature.

It wasn't that he was targeted by the extradimensional creature, but that he took the initiative to run to the territory of the extradimensional creature, and the moment he sensed the extradimensional creature with the replication talent, he felt that something was wrong, but the extradimensional creature also sensed the exploration of the replication talent, and instantly looked at it.

As a result, his replica body was discovered.

In an instant.

This extradimensional creature killed Ye Tian.

In terms of speed, Ye Tian was naturally far inferior to that extradimensional creature, and in a few breaths, he was caught up by the other party.

Extradimensional creature - Mengha!

This is the name that Ye Tian spied on with his copying talent, and the appearance of this Mengha superdimensional creature is somewhat similar to Erha, but its whole body is blue, and it is bubbling with blue flames, and its pupils are as dark black as an abyss.

I saw that Mengha spit out a mouthful of blue flames, covering Ye Tian's copy body, no matter how much he resisted, it was useless, and in an instant, his copy body was burned to ashes.

......

"The copy body was killed in seconds, what a terrifying extradimensional creature!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He estimated that his duplicate body, which was fused with the wood fragments of the Kun Realm, was no match for this extradimensional creature.

This should not be an ordinary extradimensional creature, and its strength is definitely comparable to that of a pinnacle realm god who has condensed twelve eternal realm spirits and fused low-level extradimensional things.

"No wonder Taihao Tianchao Palace didn't dare to send high-level realm gods in, but instead gave this opportunity to the top forces, and let the top forces send high-level realm gods in, after all, if you really encounter this kind of extra-dimensional creature, Taihao Tianchao Palace is useless no matter what hole cards you give to high-level realm gods, they are all killed in seconds. Even if a high-level realm god fuses something extradimensional, it is useless, and it is all sent to death. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian was ready to leave.

He was ready to let his replica body go out and leave with those resources.

Otherwise, if he doesn't go out, the gods of the Sumeru realm will definitely leave.

When the time comes, if he suddenly returns to the realm of the gods, he will inevitably be suspected.

Therefore, it is better to send a replica body back to intersect first, and they will not be suspected by the Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace, anyway, they will not dare to enter here to investigate the situation.

As a result, Ye Tian's replica body directly returned to the Death Void outside the treasure land.

Wow!

The Sumeru Realm God was still waiting here, Ye Tian returned to the Boundless Sailing Ship and said, "Sumeru Realm God, this is the resource I found!"

Ye Tian took out all the resources, and there was nothing left.

When the Sumeru Realm God saw that Ye Tian had found so many resources, he was immediately shocked and secretly surprised.

There were also many high-level realm gods who came back before, but they didn't find too many resources, and even some high-level realm gods didn't find a single resource, so they returned with heavy damage, after all, if they didn't come back, they would have to fall into it0 .....

Unexpectedly, Ye Tian's harvest alone was comparable to the harvest of many other high-level realm gods. []

Of course.

It's not that I haven't thought about hiding some resources, but if I do this, I will undoubtedly be affected by the oath, so I just take them all out.

Anyway, if Taihao Tianchao Palace is cheap, it will be cheaper for them, if it weren't for Taihao Tianchao Palace to bring him over, he would not be able to obtain these resources.

And the other high-level realm gods were stunned and a little incredulous when they saw Ye Tian harvest so much.

"Ye Heavenly Realm God, haven't you encountered any danger in the Super Dimensional Treasure Land, you have stayed for so long and found so many good things!" a high-level peak realm god asked in surprise.

"I'm in trouble, but fortunately, I'm more cautious, and the injuries I suffered are not serious, but the Eternal Dao species is affected, and I don't dare to stay, so I came out. "

Ye Tian didn't lie, his replica body was indeed injured, and the Eternal Dao Seed was indeed affected, but he came out directly without dealing with it, which was more like staying for a long time.

If there is no injury at all, then it will be questioned!

"Very good, Ye Tianjie God, you can get half of the resources!"

The god of the Sumeru realm said.

Subsequently.

The god of the Sumeru realm took half of the resources and terminated the contract test on the spot.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian sat on the boundless sailing ship of the god of the Sumeru realm on 5.7 to rest, pretending to recuperate from his injuries.

Time passes.

Ye Tian just waited, and after a long time, another high-level realm god came out, but they were all about to fall.

Then, after waiting for a long time, there was still no high-level realm god coming out.

"It seems that the other high-level realm gods have fallen!"

Sumeru realm Shinto.

There may still be a few high-level realm gods who can't come out, but the Sumeru realm gods are not ready to continue waiting.

So, the god of the Sumeru realm urged the boundless sailboat to leave.

After all, the longer he stays in the Death Void, there is also a risk, he doesn't want to stay here all the time, in case he encounters an invincible danger, not only will these high-level realm gods fall, but even he won't survive.

There is no need to continue to venture to stay here for the sake of those few high-level realm gods who may still be alive.
